channel.title: Project Black — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Project Black (prjblk).

item.title: CVE-2026-12673 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Liquidfiles versions before 4.2.12 are affected by a broken access control vulnerability resulting in privilege escalation from an Admin in a secondary domain to a Sysadmin by modifying a group in their managed secondary (non-default) group.

item.title: CVE-2026-8209 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by a path traversal vulnerability resulting in DOS by attempting extraction of web application PHP files, failed .zip extraction results in deletion of the file and a DOS condition. Successful exploitation…

item.title: CVE-2026-8208 · 8.9 HIGH
item.description: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by a local file inclusion vulnerability resulting in RCE by changing the report archive directory and forcing interpretation of a user provided .zip as PHP. Successful exploitation requires Teacher or high…

item.title: CVE-2026-8207 · 7 HIGH
item.description: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by an authenticated SQL Injection vulnerability by abusing the Tracking/graphing https://github.com/GibbonEdu/core/blob/c431e25fdc874adece5d2dc7e408e9aa2d1abadb/modules/Tracking/graphing.php#L145 feature.…

item.title: CVE-2026-6204 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: LibreNMS versions before 26.3.0 are affected by an authenticated remote code execution vulnerability by abusing the Binary Locations config and the Netcommand feature. Successful exploitation requires administrative privileges. Exploitation could res…

item.title: CVE-2026-2728 · 4.6 MEDIUM
item.description: LibreNMS versions before 26.3.0 are affected by an authenticated Cross-site Scripting vulnerability on the showconfig page. Successful exploitation requires administrative privileges. Exploitation could result in XSS attacks being performed against o…

item.title: CVE-2025-15586 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: OGP-Website installs prior git commit 52f865a4fba763594453068acf8fa9e3fc38d663 are affected by a type juggling flaw which if exploited can result in authentication bypass without knowledge of the victim account's password.

item.title: CVE-2025-15585 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Fileflows versions before 25.05.2 are affected by an authenticated SQL injection vulnerability in the library-file search function. Successful exploitation requires the system to use MySQL as the underlying database and could result in privilege esca…

item.title: CVE-2025-15581 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Orthanc versions before 1.12.10 are affected by an authorisation logic flaw in the application's HTTP Basic Authentication implementation. Successful exploitation could result in Privilege Escalation, potentially allowing full administrative access.
